mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report a workplace injury in Boise Idaho?
mainEntity.text: How long do I have to report a workplace injury in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho requires reporting on-the-job accidents to employer within 60 days of injury or discovery. Failure may forfeit workers comp benefits. File formal claim with Idaho SIC within 1 year.[2]

suggestedAnswer.text: For Boise on-the-job accidents report verbally and in writing to employer within 60 days. Idaho Industrial Commission processes claims; late reports risk denial even if injury valid. Employers must carry insurance—verify coverage. Legal aid recommended for disputes as insurers challenge causation.[2]

name: Reporting Deadlines for Workplace Injuries in Boise ID
